config_handler.solo_grupos: ❌ This command only works in groups
config_handler.solo_admins: ❌ Only admins can use this command
config_handler.solo_owner: ❌ Only the owner can use this command
config_handler.descripcion:
🎉 *WELCOME* - {prefix}{command} welcome
   Enables or disables the welcome message when someone joins the group.

🚫 *ANTILINK* - {prefix}{command} antilink
   Deletes messages containing WhatsApp group links.

🚫 *ANTILINK2* - {prefix}{command} antilink2
   Stronger anti-link system, detects almost any link.

🔐 *RESTRICT* - {prefix}{command} restrict {value}
   Enables group restrictions (owner only).

📖 *AUTOREAD* - {prefix}{command} autoread {value}
   Automatically marks all messages as read.

🎵 *AUDIOS* - {prefix}{command} audios
   Enables or disables automatic audio responses.

🏷️ *AUTOSTICKER* - {prefix}{command} autosticker
   Automatically converts images or videos into stickers.

📞 *ANTICALL* - {prefix}{command} anticall {value}
   Automatically blocks incoming calls.

☢️ *ANTITOXIC* - {prefix}{command} antitoxic
   Detects and removes toxic messages.

👑 *ADMINMODE* - {prefix}{command} modoadmin
   Only admins can use commands.

⏰ *AFK* - {prefix}{command} afk
   Controls AFK mode usage.

🗑️ *ANTIDELETE* - {prefix}{command} antidelete
   Prevents message deletion.

📊 *AUDIOS_BOT* - {prefix}{command} audios_bot {value}
   Enables or disables bot audios.

🎯 *ANTISPAM* - {prefix}{command} antispam {value}
   Blocks spam users.

📝 *ANTIPRIVATE* - {prefix}{command} antiprivado {value}
   Blocks private messages.

🌐 *PUBLICMODE* - {prefix}{command} modopublico {value}
   Switches to public mode.

👀 *VIEWIMAGE* - {prefix}{command} viewimage {value}
   Enables image preview.

🢀 *GROUPMODE* - {prefix}{command} modogrupos {value}
   Restricts usage to groups only.

gc_mute.menu:
🔇 *Mute user*

*Without time:*
{prefix}{cmd} @user

*With time:*
{prefix}{cmd} @user for 30 minutes
{prefix}{cmd} @user for 2 hours
{prefix}{cmd} @user 1h

_The user will not be able to write in the group._

cumple.help:
🌙 *Luna-Botv6-Project*

🎂 *Command: Birthdays*

*Add one or more:*
_.cumple @tag March 11_
_.cumple @tag1 May 5 @tag2 June 20_

*View group list:*
_.cumple list_

*Backup:*
_.cumple backup_
cumple.help_set:
🌙 *Luna-Botv6-Project*

✏️ *Edit birthday*

_Use the command like this:_
_.setcumple @tag December 25_

_Or to delete:_
_.delcumple @tag_

Come back in *{seg} seconds*.

aventuras.mensaje: You found a hidden chest in a mysterious cave!
You fought a skeleton warrior and came out victorious!
A wise elder gave you experience for helping him.
You stepped on a magic trap! Lost a little...
You defeated a mini-boss in the dungeon!
You found a magic potion and gained experience.
A lost merchant rewarded you for escorting him.
A dark spirit drained your energy...
An enchanted fairy blessed you with light and diamonds.
You explored ancient ruins and discovered treasures.
You silently approached a sleeping dragon and stole treasures.

tarot.bienvenida:
🔮 TAROT READING 🔮

Welcome to your mystical session.
What is your name?
tarot.pregunta_consulta: Now... your question for the universe:
tarot.pregunta_corta: Tell me a little more about your question 👀
tarot.error: The cards are confused... try again later 🔮
tarot.footer: ✨ May the stars illuminate your path 🌟

cartas.significado: Your situation requires action. You have all the tools you need. It is time to take control and manifest what you desire.
Trust your intuition now more than ever. There is hidden information that will soon be revealed. Your instinct is your greatest ally.
Abundance and fertility surround your situation. It is a good time to create and grow. Prosperity is approaching.
You need to set clear boundaries and make firm decisions. Your authority and leadership are key here.
Seek advice from experienced people. There is an important lesson to learn. Tradition has value now.
An important decision about a relationship or connection is approaching. There is harmony if you act from the heart.
Movement and progress are completely in your favor. Your determination will take you far. Victory is near.
You have more power and resilience than you think. Your inner courage is your greatest strength.
It is time for deep reflection. Your inner wisdom holds the keys you need.
A cycle is ending and another begins. Changes are inevitable but positive.
The truth will come to light soon. Things will balance out naturally.
Sometimes you have to let go to gain. A reflective pause is needed before acting.
A cycle ends so a new one can begin. Change is transformation, not destruction.
Balance is key in your situation. Moderate your actions and seek the middle ground.
Recognize what keeps you trapped. You have the power to free yourself.
A sudden but necessary change is approaching. Although disruptive, it brings clarity.
Hope is your compass. Your dreams are possible if you maintain faith.
Trust your dreams and intuition. Your subconscious has answers.
Victory and success are guaranteed. The future is radiant and full of opportunities.
It is time for a deep evaluation of your life. Renew yourself and begin the next chapter.
A cycle completes successfully. Fulfillment and wholeness are within you.

dinero.positivo:
Excellent! The cards see money in your future 💸
(Though your partner expects even more haha)
dinero.negativo:
Hmm, complicated... especially if you keep
spending without thinking 😂
dinero.neutro:
Patience, wealth comes to those who
work hard and wait 💪
dinero.generico:
The cards see potential, but remember:
money doesn't grow on trees 💭

amor.positivo:
Great news! Romance in the air ❤️
(Now do your part haha)
amor.negativo:
There's turbulence, but everything works out
with patience and understanding 💔➡️💚
amor.neutro:
Your soulmate is on the way...
Just be patient 😅
amor.generico:
Romantic movement ahead.
Let the magic happen! ✨

trabajo.positivo:
Promotion ahead! Your professional success
is imminent 📈
trabajo.negativo:
Changes coming. Sometimes changes
are for the better 🔄
trabajo.liderazgo:
Your leadership is your greatest asset.
You are destined to lead 👑
trabajo.generico:
Job opportunities on the horizon.
Keep your eyes open 👀

fiesta.positivo:
Of course! Epic night guaranteed 🎉
(Go have fun!)
fiesta.negativo:
Good chaos, the kind you remember
with friends the next day! 😂
fiesta.neutro:
Better wait a bit... or leave
the wallet at home 💸
fiesta.generico:
Go for it! The cards approve
your fun 🎊

soledad.positivo:
Light at the end of the tunnel. Good
times are coming 🌟
soledad.amor:
You are not alone. Love and care
will come into your life 💝
soledad.generico:
Loneliness is temporary.
New connections are on the way 🤝

suerte.rueda:
Wheel of Fortune! Your chances
have multiplied (at least you hope so!) 🎰
suerte.sol:
Bad news: your luck comes from working,
not from playing the lottery 💪
suerte.generico:
The cards see opportunities.
You make your own luck 🌈

genericas:
The cards say to trust the process.
The universe is on your side! 🔮

From what I see, everything points to
interesting things happening soon ✨

The energy is positive.
Keep faith in what you desire 🌙

The cards tell you to keep moving forward.
The path is clear 💫
